creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wg
Date: Wed Aug  7 23:34:55 2013
New Revision: 324370
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/324370

Log:
  devel/py-jira: Library to ease use of the JIRA 5 REST APIs
  
  A library to ease use of the JIRA 5 REST APIs
  
  WWW: http://bitbucket.org/bspeakmon/jira-python
  
  PR:		ports/180849
  Submitted by:	Alexandros Kosiaris <akosiaris gmail.com>

Added:
  head/devel/py-jira/
  head/devel/py-jira/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/py-jira/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/py-jira/files/
  head/devel/py-jira/files/patch-tlslite_requirement   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/py-jira/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/py-jira/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/devel/Makefile

Modified: head/devel/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/Makefile	Wed Aug  7 23:32:02 2013	(r324369)
+++ head/devel/Makefile	Wed Aug  7 23:34:55 2013	(r324370)
@@ -3575,6 +3575,7 @@
     SUBDIR += py-iterpipes
     SUBDIR += py-itools
     SUBDIR += py-jcc
+    SUBDIR += py-jira
     SUBDIR += py-jmespath
     SUBDIR += py-jsmin
     SUBDIR += py-json-py

Added: head/devel/py-jira/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/py-jira/Makefile	Wed Aug  7 23:34:55 2013	(r324370)
@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+# Created by: Alexandros Kosiaris <akosiaris+ports@gmail.com>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	jira
+PORTVERSION=	0.13
+CATEGORIES=	devel python
+MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
+PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
+DISTNAME=	jira-python-${DISTVERSIONPREFIX}${DISTVERSION}${DISTVERSIONSUFFIX}
+
+MAINTAINER=	akosiaris+ports@gmail.com
+COMMENT=	Library to ease use of the JIRA 5 REST APIs
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}requests>=1.0.0:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-requests \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}requests-oauthlib>=0.3.0:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-requests-oauthlib \
+		ipython${PYTHON_PKGNAMESUFFIX}>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/ipython \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}tlslite>=0.4.1:${PORTSDIR}/security/py-tlslite \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}pycrypto>=0:${PORTSDIR}/security/py-pycrypto
+
+USE_PYTHON=		yes
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
+PYDISTUTILS_PKGNAME=	jira_python
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/devel/py-jira/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/py-jira/distinfo	Wed Aug  7 23:34:55 2013	(r324370)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (jira-python-0.13.tar.gz) = 995cdace8cac68fd3189e0c19ae7fe283cbbcbf6a3442cba15f2da9fc303014d
+SIZE (jira-python-0.13.tar.gz) = 31945

Added: head/devel/py-jira/files/patch-tlslite_requirement
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/py-jira/files/patch-tlslite_requirement	Wed Aug  7 23:34:55 2013	(r324370)
@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+diff -ru setup.py setup.py
+--- setup.py 2013-04-10 09:30:59.000000000 +0300
++++ setup.py 2013-07-12 10:37:27.000000000 +0300
+@@ -11,7 +11,7 @@
+     install_requires=['requests>=1.0.0',
+                       'requests_oauthlib>=0.3.0',
+                       'ipython>=0.13',
+-                      'tlslite==0.4.1'],
++                      'tlslite>=0.4.1'],
+     extras_require={
+         'magic': ['python-magic>=0.4.2'],
+     },

Added: head/devel/py-jira/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/py-jira/pkg-descr	Wed Aug  7 23:34:55 2013	(r324370)
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+A library to ease use of the JIRA 5 REST APIs
+
+WWW: http://bitbucket.org/bspeakmon/jira-python
